metadata.description: Sulis AI plugin marketplace — methodology studios, requirements analysis, facilitation, context cartography, right-sized architecture, disciplined change primitives, deterministic code intelligence, founder coordination, and autonomous Work Package execution end-to-end. v1.78.0 lands Phase 3 first consolidation of the change-as-primitive build — sulis-context (v0.3.1 → v0.4.0 [DEPRECATED]) consolidated into sulis (v0.34.0 → v0.35.0). 5-commit chain (0e5c9ea / 584d438 / 2348bc5 / c4f6358 / wrap-up). 3 skills tin-test-renamed (discover/refresh/show → discover-context/refresh-context/show-context); 1 agent moved (context-cartographer); 3 references moved (classification-taxonomy, context-index-template, discovery-protocol); external ref sweep across 9 marketplace files for both path patterns (caught by find_external_refs.py) and slash-command patterns (caught manually — script gap surfaced for v0.1.1 patch). Gate 0 code-health baseline captured (70 pre-existing findings, tier-2 hard-stop on critical security finding). VERIFICATION_REPORT.md for the run lives at plugins/sulis/skills/consolidate-into-sulis/runs/sulis-context-2026-05-25/. First real exercise of the consolidate-into-sulis v0.1.0 methodology; recipe-improvement signals captured for v0.1.1. Next: sulis-security → sulis. v1.77.0 landed Phase 3 prep of the change-as-primitive build — authors the `consolidate-into-sulis` meta-skill (sulis v0.34.0) via add-skill v0.7.0. Codifies the proven sulis-execution → sulis migration recipe (5 commits + 2 verification gates; Gate 0 inventory/plan/code-health-baseline; Commits 1–5 move scripts/skills/agents/refs/wrap-up; Gate 6 code-health verification with rollback-vs-fix-forward threshold at >3 fix-forward commits). Ships 4 deterministic helper scripts (inventory.py JSON, detect_collisions.py + find_external_refs.py + compare_baseline.py Markdown) with a tin-test rename pass on incoming founder-visible skill names (bare verbs like `decompose` / `harden` / `probe` flagged; renamed `decompose` → `plan-work`). Independence Check via Agent subagent_type=Explore in fresh context returned Verdict: PASS across all 8 dimensions with 5 advisory refinements (all applied). Foundation for Phase 3 proper — the four upcoming consolidations (sulis-context → sulis-security → sea → srd, smallest first as practice). v1.76.0 landed Phase 2 of the change-as-primitive build — rewrites the front-door agent via add-agent v0.1.0 (concierge → Sulis rename; COACHING + TONE embedded; dual-register pattern applied with /sulis:jargon on|off toggle; new Coach + Invoker + Partner role articulation across the six-stage journey). Cross-plugin operational references updated (.concierge/ → .sulis/; /sulis-execution: → /sulis:; subagent_type sulis-execution:* → bare names). Deprecated sulis-concierge plugin shell removed (the v0.2.0 deprecation period closed at v0.33.0). Restart Claude session with `claude --agent sulis` to feel the new tone stack + dual-register behaviour. v1.75.0 lands Phase 1 of the change-as-primitive build — authors the `add-agent` meta-skill (sulis v0.32.0) via add-skill v0.7.0, mirroring its five-gate structure with three agent-specific differences (Gate 2 register declaration + dispatch contract; Gate 4 Coaching Delivery + Tone Conformance + Register Switch Correctness perspectives for founder-facing agents; Gate 5 MUC-A1..A4 + MUC-R1..R3 misuse cases). Independence Check via Agent subagent_type=Explore in fresh context returned Verdict: PASS across all dimensions. Foundation for Phase 2 (Sulis agent rewrite — concierge → Sulis with COACHING + TONE embedded and dual-register applied). v1.74.0 lands Phase 0 of the change-as-primitive design (plugins/sulis/docs/change-as-primitive-design.md) — ports COACHING_STANDARD + TONE_STANDARD from the platform into plugins/sulis/references/standards/ (now 8 standards across methodology + founder-communication tiers); adds Rule 6 (Dual register: default founder, on-request technical via /sulis:jargon on|off) to founder-facing-conventions.md. Foundation for Phase 1 (add-agent meta-skill) and Phase 2 (Sulis agent rewrite). v1.73.0 consolidates sulis-execution into the canonical sulis plugin (v0.30.0) — 50 files moved (3429-LOC _wpxlib + 11 wpx-* CLIs + 6 skills + 2 agents + 3 references + 249 tests + 8 research docs + CI workflow + cross-plugin doc updates) across 5 commits (02c1e77 / 6621e5b / 99607e8 / 5278a85 / this wrap-up). Founders now reach the executor surface natively via /sulis:run-wp WP-NNN, /sulis:run-all, /sulis:retry WP-NNN, /sulis:wp-status (renamed from status to avoid the sulis:status concierge-journey conflict), /sulis:backfill-code-review, /sulis:backfill-gates. sulis-execution shell retained at v0.25.0 as a [DEPRECATED] SDK distribution wrapper — the SDK packages (sulis-execution on PyPI, @sulis-ai/execution on npm, sulis-execution-mcp on PyPI) keep stable published names; will move to a dedicated sulis-ai/sulis-execution-sdk repo separately. No deprecation shim skills (mirrors the sulis-concierge → sulis precedent at v0.2.0). All 249 executor tests still pass; cross-skill self-test confirmed 0 findings on the migrated tree. v1.56.0 rewrites sulis:add-skill to v0.7.0 — standards-grounded methodology citing the five v1.55.0 standards at each of the five gates. Gate 1 (Find) adopts Balanced Investigation / Source Independence / Confidence Calibration + adds Primitive Discovery sub-step grounded in PG-01..04 + PD-01..06. Gate 2 (Scope Lock) adopts STANDARDS_RUBRIC phase classification + Outside-In Reasoning + MECE; new lock items: standards-phase classification, verification tier, tool stack (audit-pattern skills must declare which real tools they invoke — Semgrep / Gitleaks / Trivy / lizard / jscpd / hadolint / testssl / curl — pure-regex requires explicit justification), related skills (per REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY). Gate 3 (Generate) adopts MECE + Pyramid + SCQA + No Hyperbole linguistic audit. Gate 4 (Evaluate) adopts SPIRAL_TEMPLATES tier + dimensions + Codebase Referential Integrity + VERIFICATION_REPORT.md on disk (single filesystem check determines compliance). Gate 5 (Adversarial) adopts AT-01..03 + Independence Check for HEAVY-tier skills (Agent subagent_type=Explore in fresh context). Skills are deep + thorough, never fast — the fast-vs-deep framing rejected. Three modes: greenfield (new skill), deepening / upsurge (extending an existing skill), standards-grounded re-author (pre-v0.7.0 → v0.7.0). COMPLETENESS_REPORT.md renamed to VERIFICATION_REPORT.md (aligned with SPIRAL_TEMPLATES). v1.55.0 ships five cross-cutting standards inside the sulis plugin (plugins/sulis/references/standards/) — Critical Thinking (13 principles + 9 anti-patterns), Decomposition Procedure (PD-01..PD-06), Spiral Templates (LIGHT/STANDARD/HEAVY tiers + ACCA + Codebase Referential Integrity + Independence Check + VERIFICATION_REPORT.md template), Standards Rubric (input/processing/output/governance phase classification), Referential Integrity (4 canonical relationship types + RI-01..05). Adapted from the platform methodology standards (CRITICAL_THINKING_STANDARD v1.5.0, decomposition-procedure v1.0.0, SPIRAL_TEMPLATES v2.1.0, STANDARDS_RUBRIC v1.0.0, REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY_STANDARD v1.0.1) and trimmed for sulis scale — Wired Outcomes Registry dropped, 26-standard inventory reduced to 5 sulis-local entries, ACCA inlined into Spiral Templates so the port is self-contained. Foundation for the upsurge plan in /Users/iain/.claude/plans/eager-crunching-quail.md — Phase 1 rewrites add-skill v0.7.0 to cite these standards at each gate (replaces ad-hoc methodology with platform-proven rigor); Phase 2 upsurges each check-* skill against the methodology + scores under the spiral rubric. v1.19.0 adds sulis-business-strategy (Kind-schema variant of the business-strategy studio, v0.1.0 test fixture): ships the Identity Kind — a four-stage Kind manifest (find → generate → evaluate → decide) that replaces the legacy identity-articulation outcome's three-lens triad with a single evaluate stage + rubric + structured Verdict + reason-class routing. The triad's function (multi-perspective evaluation with consensus) is preserved structurally in evaluate + decide; its mechanism (three parallel agent lanes) is replaced. Coexists with the established sulis-strategy plugin. Until the platform engine wires Slices 2-4 of the Kind compiler, the plugin's business-strategist agent drives all four stages manually; when the engine catches up, the agent simplifies to invoking the Kind via KindHandler with no Kind YAML change. Test fixture for promoting the migration pattern to studios. v1.16.0 publishes the Repository Contract Standard (RC-01..RC-13) at plugins/srd/references/repository-contract-standard.md — the marketplace-wide specification of the GitHub repository shape every Sulis agent assumes. Locks: dev/main two-branch model, branch protections, GitHub Merge Queue config on dev (group size 5, concurrency 3, failure tolerance 3 per the Shopify pattern), six required Actions workflows (branch-ci on pull_request, merge-queue-ci on merge_group, deploy-staging on push to dev, health-and-smoke on workflow_run, promote-dev-to-main on workflow_dispatch, release-prod on push to main), staging + production environments, per-env deploy tokens, squash-only repo settings, v* SemVer tag protection, token scopes, and the agent arrival check (executor Step 0) with structured JSON output. Strict mode for v1: agents refuse non-conforming repos and surface a delta list in founder English. Composes with GIT-01..GIT-10 (operationalises the two-branch model on GitHub), EL-01..EL-08 (adds Step 0 to the executor lifecycle), and the cicd-batching-analysis.md research (the merge-queue config encodes its per-batch deploy recommendation). Companion scripts wpx-arrival-check + wpx-bootstrap-repo specified in RC-11 and the Bootstrap Workflow section; implementation scheduled for the next sulis-execution release. The cicd-batching-analysis.md technical research ships alongside at plugins/sulis-execution/docs/research/ documenting the merge-queue convention (Bors → Shopify Shipit → GitHub Merge Queue) and SEA's natural batch unit (DAG topological levels). All v1.15.x capabilities preserved.

plugins.name: srd
plugins.description: Requirements Analyst — facilitates building Software Requirements Documents through guided conversation with UML artifacts. Marketplace home of cross-plugin standards (Founder English, Repository Contract, PR Hygiene, Change Work, Critical Thinking). See CHANGELOG.md for version history.

plugins.name: sulis-context
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED at v0.4.0 — consolidated into sulis at v0.35.0] Context Cartographer functionality now lives at /sulis:discover-context, /sulis:refresh-context, /sulis:show-context with the context-cartographer agent in plugins/sulis/agents/. This plugin shell remains for marketplace compatibility; no new development.

plugins.name: sulis-strategy
plugins.description: Business strategy studio for the Outcome-First Methodology. Provides vision, strategy, principles, commercial, gtm-planning, roadmap, identity, brand-research, company-research, competitive-research, anti-goals, and win-loss-analysis skills.

plugins.name: sulis-business-strategy
plugins.description: Business Strategy studio (Kind-schema variant). Drives business-context intake, identity, brand positioning, voice, principles, and strategic foundation work through four-stage Kind workflows (find / generate / evaluate / decide).

plugins.name: sulis-product-development
plugins.description: Product development studio for the Outcome-First Methodology. Provides design, plan, implement, and complete skills for the full product delivery lifecycle. Includes test-scenarios, task-decomposition, backend/frontend development guidance, and IVS-authoring.

plugins.name: sulis-builder
plugins.description: Self-service studio creation for the Outcome-First Methodology. Creates new domain expertise packages (7-file studio bundles) using the studio-creation sequence; outcome-definition + platform integration + tail outcomes.

plugins.name: sulis-design
plugins.description: Design studio for the Outcome-First Methodology. Provides design foundation, visual identity, customer experience, design coherence, design compliance, identity articulation, and implementation system skills for translating brand into a design system.

plugins.name: sulis-platform-sdk
plugins.description: Build production-ready, business-critical applications with AI-native infrastructure. Deploy scalable SaaS backends with built-in auth, billing, multi-tenancy, and observability.

plugins.name: sea
plugins.description: Senior Engineering Architect — designs hardened architectures from SRDs, audits brownfield codebases, decomposes designs into atomic Work Packages with Red-Green-Blue verification. Publishes the Code Review Standard (CR-01..CR-10) and the decompose validation rubric. See CHANGELOG.md for version history.

plugins.name: sulis-security
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — use /sulis:code-health] Security & Viability Reviewer. Superseded by sulis v0.22.0+ check-* tier framework which covers 24 of 25 primitives at 96% parity verified via cross-validation. Only CQ-02 full coverage measurement remains deferred (detection-only in check-tests). Founders should use /sulis:code-health (full tier sweep) or /sulis:check-security (security only with --url for DAT-02 + INF-03). Kept as a deprecation shim for one major release window per the sulis-concierge migration pattern.

plugins.name: idc
plugins.description: Investor Deck Coach — facilitates Sequoia-style pitch deck creation through guided conversation, stage-aware (angel through Series B), with rigorous market research, financial modelling, adversarial investor-objection review, branded deck deliverables (PowerPoint + Reveal.js HTML), and rehearsal drill.

plugins.name: sulis-execution
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — see /sulis:*] Executor + train + wpx-* CLI tools moved into the sulis plugin at v0.30.0 (2026-05-25). Use /sulis:run-wp WP-NNN, /sulis:run-all, /sulis:retry WP-NNN, /sulis:wp-status (renamed from status to avoid sulis:status conflict with the concierge journey status), /sulis:backfill-code-review, /sulis:backfill-gates. This plugin shell retained for the SDK packages only: sdk/python (sulis-execution on PyPI), sdk/typescript (@sulis-ai/execution on npm), sdk/mcp-server (sulis-execution-mcp on PyPI). SDK packages keep stable names because external consumers depend on them; will move to a dedicated sulis-ai/sulis-execution-sdk repo separately.

plugins.name: sulis
plugins.description: Sulis — the canonical front-door plugin for the Sulis AI marketplace. Hosts the founder-facing **Sulis agent** (rewritten v0.33.0 via add-agent v0.1.0; concierge → Sulis rename; COACHING + TONE embedded; dual-register pattern with /sulis:jargon on|off toggle; coach + invoker + partner role); journey skills; three meta-skills (add-skill v0.7.0 for skills, add-agent v0.1.0 for agents, consolidate-into-sulis v0.1.0 for plugin consolidations — Phase 3 prep, Independence Check PASS); the eight cross-cutting standards; the deep-mode code-health framework (check-* tier 1-7); the address-findings bridge; and the executor + train + wpx-* CLI tools. Founders interact via /sulis:* commands. Longer-term direction is sulis as the only plugin shipped — see plugins/sulis/docs/change-as-primitive-design.md for the full 8-phase build plan.
